parts.text: Please help me transfer the remaining credit from my account to another line or plan.
I’d like to initiate a transfer of funds from my prepaid number to a postpaid number.
Can I get assistance with transferring my current account balance to a new account?
I want to transfer the balance from one line to another line in my family plan.
I need to move my funds between accounts, can you guide me through it?
Please transfer my balance from this account to another account on my service.
I’m trying to transfer the remaining funds from my prepaid account to another postpaid account.
Could you assist me in transferring the balance from my current plan to a different plan?
I want to move my account balance from one number to another under the same account.
I need help transferring my remaining credit to another line on my account.
How can I transfer my prepaid balance to a postpaid line?
I’m calling to request a transfer of funds between my accounts.
I want to shift the balance from my old line to a new line I just activated.
Can you assist me in transferring the account balance from
one
service type to another?
I’d like to complete a balance transfer from my current account to another account on file.
I want to move the funds from my prepaid line to my postpaid plan.
Please help me with transferring the money from one account to another within my plan.
I’d like to transfer the remaining balance from my secondary account to my primary account.
Can my account balance be moved from prepaid to postpaid service?
I need to transfer my balance to another phone line under my account.
Is it possible to transfer the money from my old account to a new account?
Hi, I’m looking to transfer my prepaid balance to my main postpaid line.
I want to transfer funds from my current account to another account on my plan.
Can you help me move my account balance from one line to another?
I would like to transfer the remaining balance from my prepaid account to my postpaid account.
